label: Vignette fix — screen-edge shape replaces radial circle artifact
notes: Previous radial vignette (smoothstep(0.55,1.15,r) on aspect-corrected r) created a visible oval/circle boundary mid-frame. Replaced with screen-edge formula: edgeDist = uv*(1-uv), product * 80 → pow(0.28). This follows the actual portrait frame shape — darkens from all four edges rather than cutting a circle in the content.

operations.note: Vignette formula changed from smoothstep on aspect-corrected radial distance to uv*(1-uv) screen-edge product. No visible circle.
operations.before: 1 - smoothstep(0.55, 1.15, r) pow(1.4) on aspect-corrected centered radius
